item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:work","verdict":"REPAIR","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":false,"self_flag_correct":false,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"The rendering encodes sustained regular activity motivated by expected payment but never excludes doing it for its own sake; add that criterial negation and revise the lossiness note accordingly."}
